t_ch: 你闭上双眼，颔首致意。敬不再沉默的历史、热烈而勇敢的奔赴、通往群星的旅途，匹诺康尼的过去、现在、未来，和稚子至死不渝的梦。
t_en: You close your eyes and nod in silent reverence — to a history that stays silent no longer, to the fervent and brave journey ahead, toward a voyage among the stars, to Penacony's past, present, and future, and to the child's dream that does not wane unto death.

t_ch: 你想起帕姆说的位置，根据帕姆的规划，你确定电视机应该摆在这里。
t_en: You recall the location Pom-Pom mentioned. According to Pom-Pom's plan, you're sure that the television should be placed here.
You decide to...
Place the television here.
Never mind. I'll sit on it for a bit.

t_ch: 你将辛苦扛来的电视机卸在此处，再三研究后接通了电源。
t_en: You put down the television you worked so hard to carry over. After studying it carefully, you connect it to a power source.

t_ch: 电视机正常开启，正常播放，只是当前并无节目可播。
t_en: The television turns on without any problems. It's working as per normal, except that there are no programs available right now.

t_ch: 依照匹诺康尼和《小小哈努行动》策划格莱西的标准评判，电视机的运作是正常的——但它无法播放其他电视节目，这或许需要别的手段。
t_en: By Penaconian standards — and according to Graysen, the developer of Hanu's Adventure — the television is working properly, even if it can't play other television programs. You might need to try something else.

t_ch: 但就现阶段而言，它只能用来玩《小小哈努行动》。
t_en: For now, you can only use it to play Hanu's Adventure.
You decide to...
Transform!
Never mind. I'll play it next time.

t_ch: 贴心的你瞬间想到，你的同伴们或许还没游玩过惊险刺激的《小小哈努行动》呢！
t_en: Being the kind and considerate person you are, you instantly recall that your companions might not have played the thrilling and exciting Hanu's Adventure yet.

t_ch: 热心的你毅然放弃了这次唾手可得的游玩机会，你坚持将机会留给有需要的朋友！
t_en: Being the warm-hearted person you are, you resolutely give up this chance to play. This opportunity should be given to a friend who needs it instead.

t_ch: 扑满的鼻子扬了扬，你怀疑它发现了你。这是怎么做到的？你有点搞不懂，正如你搞不懂扑满是如何跨越次元的一样。
t_en: The Trotter raises their nose. You suspect that they have noticed you... But how? You don't understand, just like how you don't understand how Trotters can cross dimensions.

t_ch: 你试图与扑满交流，但只发出了几声很酷的*哼*，扑满并没有理你。
t_en: You try to communicate with the Trotter, but all they do is snort aloofly at you a few times. The Trotter pays you no attention.

t_ch: 很酷的扶手椅，坐垫只能容纳一位乘客的屁股。看上去很有气势，适合很酷的你。
t_en: This is a cool armchair that has space only for one passenger to sit on. There's a majestic air to it, a perfect match for a cool person like you.

t_ch: 你仔细打量了它的高度，根据你的精准计算，你或许能*跳*——严格来说是某种攀爬技巧——总之你应该或许大概勉强能上去吧？
t_en: You study its height carefully. According to your precise calculations, you should be able to jump — well, more like climb, you suppose — onto it. In any case, you should be able to get up there... Right?
You decide to...
Jump as hard as you can!
You decide to jump onto it.

t_ch: 你站在高高的坐垫上，睥睨车厢，发出了一声轻蔑的*哼*
t_en: Standing on the cushions up high, you look disdainfully at the carriage down below and let out a contemptuous snort.

t_ch: 过了一会儿，你感到无聊…甚至有些恐高，你决定——
t_en: After a while, you start to feel bored... and a little acrophobic. You decide to...
Jump down!

t_ch: 跳下去吧！以你的勇敢，冲击未知的高度——但…都怪这墨镜，害你看不清脚下的路……
t_en: Let's jump down! Not knowing how high up you are is no challenge to one as intrepid as you! ...Except you can't even get a clear look at the ground below because of your sunglasses.

t_ch: 你尴尬地顺着椅子扶手滑了下去。
t_en: You awkwardly slide down the armrest of the chair.
Stand here for a little longer.

t_ch: 你独自欣赏着这片不一样的风景，你深深地吸了一口气，决定继续看下去。
t_en: You enjoy this special scenery alone. Then, you take a deep breath and... decide to keep enjoying the view.
Never mind. Better not climb up there.

t_ch: 这种无聊的行为无法激起你的挑战欲，你发出一声很酷的*哼*，彰显你的大人物身份。
t_en: Something this boring is no challenge to you. You let out a cool grunt to show just how much of a big shot you are.

t_ch: 你大步流星地迈入了丹恒的房间，以一种大人物巡逻般的姿态。
t_en: You stride into Dan Heng's room like a big shot on patrol.

t_ch: 小小哈努努的尊严实在太沉重了，按照过往的经验，他的膝盖被压至硬化，无法跳跃。
t_en: Little Hanunue's dignity weighs too heavily. Based on experiences, his knees have been rendered too stiffened to be able to jump.

t_ch: 但现在…你简直不敢相信你的眼睛，这是怎么做到的？登上台阶的一小步，却是足以载入匹诺康尼史册的一大步！
t_en: But now... you can hardly believe your eyes. How was this achieved? A small step onto the stage, yet a giant leap worthy of the Penaconian history books!

t_ch: 丹恒的书架，在不忙的时候，你会把你平日冒险所得的资料也一并添加进来。
t_en: This is Dan Heng's bookshelf. When you aren't busy, you would add all the information obtained during your daily adventures to this bookshelf.

t_ch: 你抬起头，只看得见书脊的颜色，完全看不清上面写了些什么。
t_en: You look up, but all you can see is the color of the book's spine. The text is a blur to you.

t_ch: 有趣的栏杆缝隙，这个角度看向丹恒的床铺，你只看得清变幻的水流图案。
t_en: This is an interesting gap in the railing. If you look at Dan Heng's bed from this perspective, the only thing you can see is the ever-changing flowing water pattern.

t_ch: 换作平时，以你的个头一定挤不进来…好吧，凡事也没那么绝对，你身手灵活，应该是得挤得进来的。
t_en: Any other time, given your size, you'd never be able to squeeze in here... But never say never. You're nimble, so it might very well be possible, after all.

t_ch: …但就算挤进来了，多半会被栏杆卡住头，你开始想象大声呼叫然后被帕姆或丹恒所救的尴尬场景。
t_en: ...Still, even if you do manage to squeeze in, your head will probably get stuck in the railing. You start to imagine how embarrassing it would be if you had to call for help, and Pom-Pom or Dan Heng had to rescue you.

t_ch: 你大步流星地迈入了三月七的房间，以一种大人物巡逻般的姿态。
t_en: You stride into March 7th's room like a big shot on patrol.

t_ch: 能爬上去看看吗？你有点想尝试，但你与生俱来的道德感制止了这个决定。
t_en: Can you climb up and have a look? Part of you itches to try, but your innate sense of ethics stops you.

t_ch: 你无法在穿衣镜里看清自己现在的模样，这令你倍感失望。
t_en: Unable to see yourself clearly in the full-length mirror, you feel extra disappointed.

t_ch: 因为就在刚才，在看到镜子边挂着的帕姆衣服的时候，你萌生了一种跃跃欲试的想法。
t_en: Why? Because you saw Pom-Pom's outfit hanging by the mirror just now, and you were dying to try it out.

t_ch: 门被锁住了，你试图开门，但任你如何叫门，它纹丝不动。
t_en: The door is locked. You try to open it, but it wouldn't budge, no matter how much you call out for somebody to open it.
You grunt sadly.

t_ch: 你时刻铭记着自己现在的身份——小小哈努兄弟，所向披靡勇猛无敌——你试图探索一切未知的区域。
t_en: Bearing in mind your current identity at all times — Brother Hanu Story! Undauntable, untouchable, and unbeatable! — you attempt to explore all the uncharted territories.

t_ch: 但你已离电视机太远，信号渐弱，你隐约间看到了《小小哈努行动》游戏标题的退出按钮。看来你无法再向前迈出半步了。
t_en: However, you are too far away from the television. The signal is fading. You can vaguely see the "Exit" button in the title of Hanu's Adventure. It looks like you won't be able to move any further ahead.

t_ch: 丹恒的床铺，严格来说是「地铺」。
t_en: Dan Heng's bed. Strictly speaking, just a bedroll on the floor.

t_ch: 以前朝下看还不觉得，此刻你望着粼粼波光的地面，感觉自己像在海上漂泊。忽有眩晕感袭来。
t_en: You didn't feel this when you previously looked down. Right now, as you gaze at the shimmering waves on the floor, you feel like you're drifting on the ocean's surface, and suddenly feel dizzy.

t_ch: 持明一族也会晕船吗？你无法克制自己的好奇心…或许回头可以问问丹恒。
t_en: Would Vidyadhara get seasick? You find it hard to contain your curiosity... Maybe you can ask Dan Heng later.
Welcome, Trailblazer...
To the Radiant Feldspar!
Dear guest, this way please...
We wish you a pleasant journey!
Hi, captain!
Hi, captain!
Keep up the great work, captain!
Safe travels!
Every time the captain walks past...
Their entire person just disappears into thin air...
Could it be a legendary...
Magic show involving living people?
Sigma's interactive arts...
Penacony's Odes of Harmony...
Which one do you prefer?
Based on data analysis...
Planet Screwllum's technology...
Looking for the answer to the universe, huh...
Tasteful decors...
The upcoming ball...
I shall look forward to it...
L—Lost...
S—Starving...
S—Scared...
C—Can't see me...
Updating the work log...
Initiating regular maintenance...
What a beautiful sunny day...
Indeed, praise Kephale...
It's done?
Don't remind me. There's dirt in my shoe...
When are you heading back to the Palace?
Soon.
Do you think it really works?
Believe in Cerces...
I experienced it myself.
What's on special today?
I heard there's a discount for the fruits...
Child, it's good to be thrifty.

t_ch: 你好，你也是来租大地兽的吗？
t_en: Hello, are you also here to rent a dromas?

t_ch: 我们这儿驮兽拼团差一位…
t_en: Our pack beast bulk sale group is short of one person...

t_ch: 我东西少，价格再便宜点呗。
t_en: I'm not buying much. Can you give me a lower price?

t_ch: 爸爸，今天可以打水仗吗？
t_en: Daddy, can we have a water fight today?
Sure, but you have to keep it down.

t_ch: 你得学会尊重神圣的水域。
t_en: You have to learn to respect the sacred waters.
Also, take note of your safety, don't mess around.
Have you taken a dip in the cold pool before?

t_ch: 听说那是法吉娜的试炼。
t_en: I heard that's part of Phagousa's trial.
Try it a few times. It's good for your health.
Not today... Promise I'll do it next time.
Tired from soaking? Want to eat something?
Let's finish listening before we leave.
What would you like to drink?
There's freshly squeezed juice. Would you like some?

t_ch: 诸位听众，今日我们讲述艾格勒的故事。
t_en: Dear audience, today we'll be telling the story of Aquila.

t_ch: 伟大的光明之神，创造了昼夜！
t_en: The mighty God of Light created day and night!

t_ch: 愿祂的光芒永远照耀我们！
t_en: May THEIR light shine upon us forever!
This story sounds a little familiar.

t_ch: 应该是从叙事诗里改编的。
t_en: I think it's based on an epic poem.

t_ch: 噢，我就说这情节很熟悉。
t_en: Ah, no wonder I found the narrative familiar.

t_ch: 艾格勒的故事嘛，早听腻了。
t_en: It's the story of Aquila. I'm already bored of it.
I wanna be high up like that too!
But, can you give a speech?
Let me tell you, Cerces is...
Okay, okay, hush now.
Oronyx... Please give me your guidance...
The source of creation...

t_ch: 浴场今天好像有新的表演。
t_en: There seems to be a new show at the baths today.
I think it's some storytelling show.
Why aren't you attending the show?
I'm all grown up. These are all so childish.
*thunderous snoring*
My splashes are higher than yours!
She probably takes after her parents...
Aren't you coming in to have fun?
I won't bother you lot.
I'm even taller than Kephale now!
Why didn't you block that ball then?
Stop zoning out!
I soaked for too long. Better stand for a while.
You're finally here. You all right?
I'm fine. Just got lost.
How did you even lose your way here?

t_ch: 兄弟，你看着又壮了一圈。
t_en: Bro, you look stronger than before.
All thanks to Nikador's blessing.
Hush... Don't take their name in vain.
That is a brilliant technique...
It was great! What's this?
I want to listen some more...
Look, Mom's dozed off.
Huff... Huff...
Mm... Where is the water cup...

t_ch: 只要坚持一天喝十罐水。
t_en: Just drink ten vats of water a day.
And Phagousa shall bless you.
...Who can even handle that?
That's kinda unreliable...
Whoever falls first loses!
The trial of Talanton is so hard...
Wanna go pat a dromas?
It's huge. Aren't you afraid...?
O, Great Cerces...
Thank you for the food you give us.
Shouldn't you be thanking Georios?
This was grown from trees!
What plans do you all have for later?
I just got here. I'll follow you.
I'll keep soaking.
I meant your future!
...That's stuff for later.
Back in the baths again.

t_ch: 今天要不去凉点的池子？
t_en: How about a cooler pool today?
Time for a soak.
I want to try the hot water there!
My lucky charm is gone... *sobs*
Do you remember where you put it?
I think... it should be... I don't know...
*sobs* I don't remember, Mommy.

t_ch: 别急，我们慢慢找就是了。
t_en: Don't panic. We'll keep looking.
Bath towel... This one?
Wanna go smoke another vat?
Since we're here, we might as well try.
You guys better not overdo it.
I feel like I'm gonna fall apart...
You're kidding. Zagreus?
That's why I'm worried.

t_ch: 悬锋城的事，你应该知道吧。
t_en: You know what happened in Castrum Kremnos, right?
Yes, I've heard the news.

t_ch: 早做准备，你也该锻炼一下了。
t_en: Never hurts to prep early. You should start training.
...I'll think about it.
So much water, and it's so hot...
How do they do it?
It's all thanks to the power of Phagousa.
So hot, so sweaty...

t_ch: 感觉像在被艾格勒注视…
t_en: Feels like I'm being watched by Aquila...
Look at all this hot water!
Thanatos, begone!
Ready?

t_ch: 尼卡多利的试炼要来了~
t_en: The trial of Nikador has come!
Bring it on. I'm... I'm not afraid!
As long as I endure the tempering of the waterfall...
I will become a hero too!
This is washing your hair, at best...
This place is so different from Castrum Kremnos!
Good thing we came here, eh?

t_ch: 妈妈，我们还要继续走吗？
t_en: Mommy, are we going to keep traveling?

t_ch: 不了，以后就在这儿住下吧。
t_en: No, we'll be living here in the future.
...But I miss Daddy.
...But I can only see him in my dreams.
This is the sacred beast of Phagousa!
It's so cute. I don't believe it.

t_ch: 今天的水果看着不够新鲜……
t_en: Today's fruits don't look fresh enough...
Talanton does not advocate waste.
What next?
I want to head back for another soak.
Something's going on inside?
Better not be the Spirithief...

t_ch: 注意到了吗，最近大浴场…
t_en: Did you notice? There seem to be more...
...more guests in the grand baths lately.
People want to bathe more when they're more stressed.
Aquila will instantly defeat Oronyx!
Defeat my foot!
Instantly!
Even children are... Is this really okay?
Mm, I mean, I really mean it.
What does "moving over" mean?
Shh, we're going to get discovered.
What a nice way to live...
I wonder how long this will last.
If the black tide comes...
Okhema won't fall.
Calendars are a kind of metaphysical concept...

t_ch: 毕竟它是刻法勒规定的。
t_en: After all, it was what Kephale dictated.
Shouldn't that be called "truth" instead?
You two are laughable.

t_ch: 又一篇「艾格勒的启目集」…
t_en: Another "Aquila's Enlightenment"...
Can't they write more gossip?
Faith can dispel the black tide!
Phagousa will protect us!
Here we go again, the same old shtick...
I hear it's full.
It's really been bustling recently.
I prefer it here than inside.
Music, right? I get it.

t_ch: 真不愧是黄金裔英雄们。
t_en: They're not called the Chrysos Heirs heroes for nothing.
To think something like this would happen...
Feels like I'm sinking...

t_ch: 法吉娜保佑，法吉娜保佑…
t_en: O Phagousa protect me, Phagousa protect me...
I'll take care of you!
Ooh, all right... Thanks for the hard work.
*yelling*
...Gotta be more meticulous.
Inside this is...
I wonder if the heroes are around?
I have to organize the files quickly...

t_ch: 要对吉奥里亚保持敬畏。
t_en: Be in awe of Georios.
You were saying not to eat the fruits?
I meant to say don't waste food.
Across the mountains stands Okhema...

t_ch: 刻法勒是我们的敌人吗？
t_en: Is Kephale our enemy?
The Fate Titans made no such claim.
Welcome, travelers from afar.
I'm here for prophecies, not for you.

t_ch: 我的话语即是泰坦意志。
t_en: My words carry the Titan's will.
Holy fruit with the Maiden's blessing...
A gift for you and your friends.
This way for the pilgrimage tour—
Do I have to pay to enter?

t_ch: 请勿大声喧哗，别走散了！
t_en: Quiet please, and keep with the group!
What an incredible view.
This group tour was worth every coin.

t_ch: 朋友，你相信欧洛尼斯吗？
t_en: My friend, have you faith in Oronyx?

t_ch: 我们的相遇是有意义的。
t_en: Our paths crossed for a reason.

t_ch: 说不定在某个平行时空里。
t_en: Maybe in another spacetime.
We had a history once...
But my faith lies with Zagreus.
Language transforms to melody...
Our prayers build the path to ascension...
What lies ahead... where I must go...
Great Fate Titans, hear my voice—
Talanton's justice is eternal...

t_ch: 那为什么你长得比我高？
t_en: So how come you're taller than me?
That, child, is Kephale's fault.
The Fate Titans show our path...
Why are you crying?
Because... time no longer waits for me.

t_ch: 要进行祭司选拔考试了…
t_en: Time for the priest selection trials...
I'm going to make it this time!
Aren't you taking the exam?

t_ch: 我已经内定下任辅祭了。
t_en: They've already picked me internally as the next acolyte.
I saw the Holy Maiden yesterday!
I heard her hair is blue...

t_ch: 是不是特别地温柔善良？
t_en: Is she as kind and gentle as they say?
We have so few records about the Maiden...
The priests say that's restricted information!
Kephale's city... Okhema.
I'll be departing for there soon.

t_ch: 这是命运泰坦的神谕吗？
t_en: Have the Fate Titans ordained this journey?
No, I chose this path myself.

t_ch: 塔兰顿能衡量它自己吗？
t_en: Does Talanton weigh their own weight?

t_ch: 信仰先于理解，我的孩子。
t_en: Faith comes before understanding, my child.
So many offerings...
So few worth selling.
I've come all this way.
Only to face such discourtesy!

t_ch: 最近求神谕的人有点多…
t_en: Many come seeking prophecies these days...
See the priest for your waiting number.
These papers won't last...

t_ch: 所以才叫你刻在石板上。
t_en: That's why stone tablets are better.
Stand back, all of you!

t_ch: 圣女大人正在请求神谕。
t_en: The Holy Maiden is receiving her prophecy.
If only I could become the Holy Maiden...
Me too.
Um. Okay?

t_ch: 命运圣城，我们终于到了…
t_en: At last, the Holy City of Fate...
Let's go see the Holy Maiden!
If you're not used to Dawncloud...
I'm fine. I'll get used to it.
The Council of Elders plans to cut costs...

t_ch: 省下的都应该交给祭司。
t_en: All the savings should be handed over to the priests.

t_ch: 投票前还有些时间犹豫。
t_en: I still have some time to hesitate before voting.
Hesitate? Do not be indecisive.
It's full of sophistry. I can stand it no more.
Our votes are more.
Kephale is carrying...
Our destiny...

t_ch: 你知道树庭发生的事吗？
t_en: Do you know what happened in the Grove?
Ah, don't mention it. It's so sad.
I will offer you victory...
May you return triumphantly, my...
Your vision isn't broad enough...
You're just talking nonsense...
The mighty and divine Kephale...
Proceed with respect...
O Kephale on high!
Ahh... Kephale...
To be immortalized in song...

t_ch: 便注定要在人世间灭亡。
t_en: One must inevitably perish in the mortal realm.

t_ch: 美丽的旧世界，如今在何处？
t_en: O beautiful old world, where are you now?

t_ch: 传说的黄金世，快回到人间！
t_en: O legendary Era Chrysea, return to the mortal realm!
Splendid gods...
...Once walked the paths we walk.
What about the promise the Council of Elders made?
The results of the citizens' assembly have been determined!
Kephale has responded to me!
If I believe you, I'll be...
Have you heard of the Theater Festival?
Can you tell me more about it?
Alas, all that's left of that warmth...
...Is a hazy mirage.

t_ch: 种质库的内容必须备份！
t_en: The Gene Bank must be backed up!
But how do you take it with you?
Whatever... Just hold it tight!

t_ch: 不能回头看，也不能向前…
t_en: No looking back. No moving forward...
We'll reunite in the new world, right?

t_ch: 我不要新世界，还我姐姐！
t_en: I don't want a new world — give me back my sister!
Almost there... Just a little longer...
Do some good before the Era Nova.
Who cares about you? Who cares about me?
In the next world...
Will we be born as women?
As long as I don't turn into a dromas, I'm good.

t_ch: 我父亲的遗物还在家里！
t_en: My father's keepsakes are still at home!
What matters more — your life or the keepsakes?
I'll leave both to you then!
The Chrysos Heirs...
Is it possible an accident has happened to them?
Quit overthinking, old man.
We've got rations for fifteen daybreaks, tops...
Someone must head to the warehouse.
Okhema's eternal night...
It's even darker than the outside world...
Kremnoans? Why are you...
Kremnoans never leave debts of gratitude unpaid.

t_ch: 在新世界，我们还会相遇吗？
t_en: Will we meet again in the new world?
If you don't find me, you're dead meat.
The world... it's collapsing?
Was all of this just a lie?
How do we treat the Mountain Dweller's wounds...

t_ch: 有没有吉奥里亚祭司啊？
t_en: Is the priest of Georios around?
Have I been soaking for too long?
Monster, don't even think about taking another step.
A black tide monster, huh?
Come closer, and I'll introduce you to my fists.
Get us out of the city now!
Urrhh!
That's... a lot of big ones.
Not as big as the ambrosia bottle, hehe.
We need to fall back to somewhere safe!
There are things we have to take with us...

t_ch: 不然活着还有什么意思！
t_en: Otherwise, what's the point of surviving?
To be immortalized in song...

t_ch: 便注定要在人世间灭亡。
t_en: One must inevitably perish in the mortal realm.
To be immortalized in song...

t_ch: 便注定要在人世间灭亡。
t_en: One must inevitably perish in the mortal realm.
Brazier, fell...
Thankfully, hammer, unbroken.
The monsters are quiet... Does that mean...

t_ch: 我们已经在新世界了吗？
t_en: We're already in the new world?
No one around? Guess I'm swimming a few laps!
The new world is almost here!

t_ch: 新作的原稿，该给谁看呢…
t_en: This new manuscript... who should I show it to first?
Oh no oh no oh no. The black tide has consumed everything...
Buddy, stay calm.
Looks like the Nousporists were right...
Stop arguing and help with the evacuation!
So this is a black tide monster...
The battle... it's brutal...
The latest volume of One Punch God...
That's what I'm talking about! Is that all Aquila's got?
Seeds should be shared with everyone!

t_ch: 作物种子也要开源才是！
t_en: Even crop seeds should be free-for-all!

t_ch: 这下我的最新研究总算派得上用场了。
t_en: My latest research is finally being put to good use.
She turned crimson right before my eyes...
This isn't your fault!
My friend's still in the baths...
Comms, down. Wait.
The disaster relief fund I donated...
They ran off with the money ages ago!
Where to? Dolos? Loukas?
They were all swallowed by the black tide!
There are still people trapped in the Council Square...
I fear... it's too late.
No matter what happens...
We'll never let go of each other's hands.
O great Zagreus...
How do we escape a situation like this...
Why isn't this covered in your book!
The dawn of Era Nova...
I shall embrace the Coreflame!
To save this deadweight...
She even threw her life away!
Don't let her sacrifice be in vain.
Here, safe, stay here.
Sorry... I'm sorry...
Hah... quite the spectacle, huh?
At least I didn't miss it this time.

t_ch: 星槎海的码头一如往常，星槎起起落落，成就了一片喧闹的景观。
t_en: The docks at the Starskiff Haven are the same as always, with the starskiffs coming and going creating a bustling scene.

t_ch: 你面前是一艘公共客运星槎。人们搭乘这种星槎，可以用相当便宜的价格在不同洞天之间航行。
t_en: Before you is a public transport starskiff. People catch this kind of transport to sail between different delves for a relatively low price.

t_ch: 这本应只是星槎海上司空见惯的景观，直到一道银白色的闪光飞过你的肩头，落在那艘星槎的尾翼上，发出一声脆响。
t_en: It was just another day at the Starskiff Haven, until a silvery flash shoots over your shoulder, landing on the tail of the starskiff bus with a crisp clang.

t_ch: 哎…瞧我这准头儿，怎么又没扔进去……
t_en: Darn it... how did I miss that shot?

t_ch: 不好意思，你能让一下吗？你这个站位有点妨碍我瞄准。
t_en: Excuse me, can you step aside? You're blocking my aim.
What are you doing?

t_ch: 我在祈福啊。你看见星槎后面那个圆圈了吗？那东西是星槎的引擎，叫做「玦轮」。
t_en: Why, I'm making a prayer. See that circle behind the starskiff? That thing is its engine — a jade wheel.

t_ch: 只要将硬币投入玦轮，就可以让接下来的旅途平安顺利。看我——丢！
t_en: Just toss a coin into the jade wheel and the upcoming journey will go completely smoothly. Check it out — unf!
Sorry, there you go.

t_ch: 好嘞，麻烦你了。你看见星槎后面那个圆圈了吗？那东西是星槎的引擎，叫做「玦轮」。
t_en: Oh, thanks for that. See that circle behind the starskiff? That thing is its engine — a jade wheel.

t_ch: 只要将硬币投入玦轮，就可以让接下来的旅途平安顺利。看我——丢！
t_en: Just toss a coin into the jade wheel and the upcoming journey will go completely smoothly. Check it out — unf!
You just slammed me in the kidney. I'll need some reparations.

t_ch: 你是什么款式的人类？肾长肩膀上？况且我扔个硬币而已，能造成多大伤害啊？
t_en: What kind of person grows a kidney on their shoulders? Besides, all I did was toss a coin. How much damage could that possibly do?

t_ch: 别闹了，让开让开。你看见星槎后面那个「玦轮」了吗？只要将硬币投入玦轮，就可以让接下来的旅途平安顺利。看我——丢！
t_en: Quit whinnying and get outta my way. See that jade wheel behind the starskiff? Just toss a coin into it and the upcoming journey will go completely smoothly. Check it out — hah!

t_ch: 女人再次丢出一枚硬币，那硬币划出一道弧线，打在「玦轮」的边缘，落入了天空球之中。
t_en: The girl flings another coin, tracing an arc through the air as it hits the rim of the jade wheel and clunks down into the middle of the skybox.
(Keep watching.)
(Stop watching.)

t_ch: 哎呀呀呀，哎呀！怎么又没扔中？我还有急事要去一趟永狩原呢，我那些伙伴们还等着我一起去放生呢……
t_en: Ahh, good grief! How'd I miss again? I'm gonna be late to the Ever-Hunt Plains, all my friends are waiting for me for the life-release ceremony...
Must you toss in a coin before you go anywhere?

t_ch: 那必须的必啊！星槎能顺利飞行，都是靠神明的庇佑，不好好做这些敬礼神明的仪式，是很容易出事故的！
t_en: Yes, for sure! Starskiffs rely on the blessing of the gods to sail smoothly. It's way too easy for accidents to happen — unless I pay proper homage to the gods through ritual!
That's so superstitious...

t_ch: 你懂个…不行，我要与人为善、我要与人为善…你要明白，星槎能顺利飞行，都是靠神明的庇佑，不好好做这些敬礼神明的仪式，是很容易出事故的！
t_en: What do you kn— No! Thou shalt be kind, thou shalt be kind... You must understand that Starskiffs rely on the blessing of the gods to sail smoothly. It's way too easy for accidents to happen — unless I pay proper homage to the gods through ritual!
Don't lose faith. Give it a few more tries.

t_ch: 唉，敬礼神明这种事，能不能成功，主要看内心是否澄澈。我这接连失败，想必是因为内心不够澄澈，还沾染了些许污垢吧。
t_en: Ack, the success of this ritual mainly depends on the purity of your heart. I keep failing at this because my heart isn't pure enough, must've been stained by impurities.

t_ch: 而且我只剩下三枚硬币了。这是伙伴们专门铸造的，用于敬礼神明的专用硬币…每年的配额都很有限，用完了就没了……
t_en: And I've only got three coins left on me. These are special coins minted by my friends to pay homage to the gods... Because they're limited edition, once they're gone, they're really gone.
Stop that. It's dangerous!

t_ch: 危险？不扔才危险呢！星槎能翱翔于天际，就是凭借着星神的注视啊。唉…懒得和你解释，让开让开，让我再投一次。
t_en: Dangerous? It's dangerous if I don't throw it! Starskiffs are only able to soar through the skies thanks to the blessing of Aeons. *sigh* I can't be bothered explaining it to you. Just get out of my way, I'll do one more try.

t_ch: 你为了阻止女人继续投币，冲上前去攥住了她的双手。她大声呼喊，终于引来了地衡司的执事。
t_en: You rush forward and grab both her hands to prevent her from tossing the coin. She cries out and makes a scene — attracting the attention of officers from the Realm-Keeping Commission.

t_ch: 面对执事的问询调解，你们各执一词，争辩不休。围观的人越来越多，执事不得不将你们都被带到了地衡司公廨。
t_en: As the officers begin interrogations, each of you argues your position. As the crowd of onlookers grows and grows, the officer is forced to take you both down to the Chancery.
(Keep watching.)

t_ch: 嗯…我想到一个好主意，可以增加祈愿成功的概率…一次直接扔三枚硬币！乱枪打鸟，总归能命中。
t_en: Hmm... I just thought of something that can increase the chance of being blessed... Just toss three coins at a time! Even a broken clock is right twice a day!

t_ch: 女人屏息凝神，手腕发力，将三枚硬币抖了出去。那三枚硬币如狂风骤雨，击打在星槎的尾翼上，无一命中目标。
t_en: The woman holds her breath, concentrates intently, and hurls three coins. They scatter and ping the tail of the starskiff, but not a single one hits their mark.

t_ch: 哎…算了，给伙伴们发个短信请假吧。看来这次放生我是去不了了。不过没关系……
t_en: Tsk, forget it... I'll message my friends and tell them I can't make the life-release ceremony. I'm sure it'll be fine...

t_ch: 伙伴们都说，只要祈愿满三百次，下一次祈愿必然应验。现在算来，应该也快到我的大保底了。
t_en: My friends all say that if I prayed <unbreak>300</unbreak> times, the next prayer is sure to come true. By my estimations, my guaranteed prayer should be coming up soon, then.
Give me a coin. I'll help throw it for you.

t_ch: 哦？这么有自信吗？来，三枚都给你了，你来试试看。敬礼神明是大功德啊，我将这个机会让给你，你可不要浪费啊。
t_en: Oh, you're optimistic! Here you go, take all three and give it a try. Paying homage to the gods is indeed a great virtue. I'll be generous and give you this chance — so don't waste it.

t_ch: 你接过三枚硬币，瞄准玦轮的正中心。
t_en: You take the three coins, and aim at the center of the jade wheel.

t_ch: 屏息凝神，来，回想一下三月七是如何拉弓射箭的。投掷与射击，在瞄准的感觉上也许大体一致。
t_en: Hold your breath and focus. Come on! Remember how March 7th draws and shoots her bow. Throwing, shooting — they both rely on accurate aim.
(Aim at the center of the jade wheel.)

t_ch: 哎呀，真可惜。差点就能命中目标了。女人看着你，似乎对你的能力产生了怀疑。
t_en: Shoot, what a shame. You almost hit the bullseye. The girl gives you a look that says she doesn't really trust in your abilities.
(Aim below the jade wheel.)

t_ch: 硬币都没沾到星槎的边，径直落入了天空球中。女人在一旁毫不掩饰地嗤笑。
t_en: The coin doesn't even hit the side of the starskiff, and falls straight into the skybox. The woman doesn't bother concealing her schadenfreude.
(Aim above the jade wheel.)

t_ch: 真是一记精准的射门！硬币准确地命中了玦轮的中心！
t_en: What an incredible throw! The coins land dead in the center of the Jade Wheel!

t_ch: 好啊，没想到你真有两把刷子！这下咱俩的功德可都积攒了不少啊。那么下次再见吧，我要去永狩原了。
t_en: Alright, I didn't see that coming — you actually did it! Now, we've both guaranteed our sacred virtue. I'll see you next time. I have to shoot off to the Ever-Hunt Plains.

t_ch: 喂！你们两个！在干什么呢！
t_en: Hey, you two! Whaddaya think you're doing!

t_ch: 糟了！条子来了！咱们快撤！
t_en: Rats, it's the cops! Let's get outta here!

t_ch: 咱们分头行动！你跑左边，我跑右边！山高路远咱们后会无期了！
t_en: Let's split up! You go left, and I'll head right. It's a big scary world out there, and I'm sure our paths will never cross again!
(Run left.)

t_ch: 分头跑就想甩掉我？我这么多年执事是白干的？谛听！分头追！
t_en: Think you can shake me by splitting up? Did you think I was born yesterday? Diting! Let's go!

t_ch: 别别别别，你这谛听怎么还会咬人！
t_en: No no no, this guy Diting is really vicious!
(Run right.)

t_ch: 你是不是左右不分啊！说好的分头行动呢！
t_en: Can you not tell left from right? I thought we were gonna split up!

t_ch: 一起逃？太好了，正好将你们一网打尽。
t_en: Fleeing together, are you? Great, two birds with one stone then.
I can't run anymore...
Don't stop!

t_ch: 谛听，看着这位嫌疑人。我去追另一位。
t_en: Keep an eye on this perpetrator, Diting. I'm going after the other one.

t_ch: 啊啊啊！这条子跑得也太快了！
t_en: Ahh nooo! This cop is super fast!

t_ch: 这帮「投币祈愿」的家伙…也不知道是从哪儿听来了一大套迷信的说辞，非要往玦轮里面扔东西。
t_en: This wretched clique of Coin Zealots... Who knows where they got their superstitious ideas from, but they insist on throwing stuff into jade wheels.

t_ch: 您说说，这多危险啊！要万一硬币被卷进发动机再甩出来，速度可比旧式火铳的子弹都快。虽说比不上现代武器，但给人打个透心凉可是绰绰有余。
t_en: Isn't that utterly dangerous!? If a coin somehow got stuck in the engine and spit out, its velocity would be faster than a speeding bullet. Modern weapons are far scarier, of course, but its impact is still enough to shoot through flesh and bone.

t_ch: 幸亏您阻止了她，真不愧是仙舟的贵客啊。
t_en: Thankfully, you stopped her. No wonder you're an esteemed guest of the Xianzhou.

t_ch: 刚才路过的执事不明真相，把您也带进了公廨，真是不好意思。请收下这些吧，权当是见义勇为的谢礼了。
t_en: That officer just then didn't understand the situation and shouldn't have brought you here. I'm sorry about that. Hold onto this, and consider it thanks for doing what's right.

t_ch: 我说，{NICKNAME}啊，不是我说您…您好歹是仙舟的贵客，怎么还能掺和进这种违法活动中去？
t_en: I didn't want to tell you this, {NICKNAME}... You're a guest here on the Xianzhou. How did you get caught up in this kind of illegal activity?

t_ch: 这帮「投币祈愿」的家伙…也不知道是从哪儿听来了一大套迷信的说辞，非要往玦轮里面扔东西。
t_en: This wretched clique of Coin Zealots... Who knows where they got their superstitious ideas from, but they insist on throwing stuff into jade wheels.

t_ch: 多危险啊！您命大才没出事，要万一硬币被卷进发动机再甩出来，速度可比旧式火铳的子弹都快。虽说比不上现代武器，但给您打个透心凉可是绰绰有余。
t_en: How dangerous! You're lucky that nothing happened to anyone. If a coin somehow got stuck in the engine and spit out, its velocity would be faster than a speeding bullet. Modern weapons are far scarier, of course, but its impact is still enough to shoot through flesh and bone.

t_ch: 那位我们已经抓起来，念在您是初犯，还是仙舟的贵客…给您两条路吧，要么交一万信用点罚款，要么去参加社区服务。您怎么选？
t_en: We've already apprehended the other one, and seeing as you're a first-time offender, as well as a guest of the Xianzhou... We'll give you a choice. Either pay a <unbreak>10,000</unbreak>-credit fine, or complete community service. Which one is it going to be?
I'll pay up...

t_ch: 行。那这笔罚款我就收下了啊。往玦轮里面扔东西是非常危险的，下次请您做事之前三思而行。
t_en: Okay, I'll take that then. It's incredibly dangerous to throw objects into a jade wheel. Please, think twice before you act.
You might as well lock me in...

t_ch: …哎，怎么说您好呢。您好歹也是景元将军的客人，我也不好真给您抓起来。这次就这么算了吧……
t_en: *sigh* How should I drill this into your brain... It's a good thing you're a guest of General Jing Yuan, otherwise you'd be arrested already. You're off the hook this time...

t_ch: 总而言之，往玦轮里面扔东西是非常危险的。以后不要再做这种事了。
t_en: Whatever it is, it's extremely dangerous to chuck coins into a jade wheel. Please do not do things like this ever again.

t_ch: 说罢，女人默默地离开了。
t_en: After talking, the woman walked off quietly.
{NICKNAME}...

t_ch: 列车长今天心情似乎很好？
t_en: The conductor seems to be in a pretty good mood today?

t_ch: 嗯哼～听丹恒乘客说，你们在「罗浮」的事务都处理完了帕？
t_en: Uh-huh~ I heard Dan Heng say that you got everything taken care of on the Luofu, right?
